aries.horoscope_text: All continues to go well personally and professionally, Aries. You're feeling strong and vigorous, but you might find that you're a bit vague today. Your mind may not have its usual acuity, and you could be easily distracted. This isn't a good day to start new projects. Try to concentrate on finishing up old tasks and tying up loose ends in order to make this a rewarding day.
aries.deploy_today: No — your mind is vague today and 'tying up loose ends' is not a deployment strategy.
aries.prophecy: The stars say finish what you started. You will start something new by 10am.

taurus.horoscope_text: Your high from your recent successes could have you wanting to go crazy purchasing luxury items you didn't feel were practical before, Taurus. This is fine as long as you're discriminating and don't give in to impulse buying. This also isn't a good time to overindulge in food and drink. You should definitely enjoy your successes while still making use of your common sense.
taurus.deploy_today: Maybe — you're feeling lucky, but impulse deploying is just impulse buying with worse consequences.
taurus.prophecy: Your successes are real. Your impulse control is theoretical.

gemini.horoscope_text: Not only your own success but that of members of your household could have you on a real emotional high today, Gemini. Your mind is likely to be buzzing with possibilities for future expansion, some of which may not be all that workable. However, you should allow yourself a few flights of fancy. Tomorrow your feet will be back on the ground and you'll see things in a more practical light.
gemini.deploy_today: Maybe — the ideas seem brilliant now. Tomorrow they'll look like a 400-line function with no tests.
gemini.prophecy: The stars say dream big. You have proposed a microservices rewrite, a new design system, and a hackathon — it is Tuesday. 🌀

cancer.horoscope_text: Today may prove to be one of your busiest in a long time, Cancer. The promise of continuing success could find you spending a lot of time on the phone, sending messages or emails, or perhaps making a few short trips around the community. You might not be able to reach everyone you hoped to speak to, however. Don't let this get you down. Just be persistent and you'll reach them eventually.
cancer.deploy_today: No — you'll be too busy in Slack to notice the deployment is still running.
cancer.prophecy: The busiest day in months. Your calendar has three 'quick syncs,' no agendas, and no end times.

leo.horoscope_text: Business and financial successes have you feeling happy and satisfied, Leo. You're also looking forward to moving ahead. The downside of this period is that people who aren't particularly trustworthy could decide to grab your coattails for their own purposes. Some might even ask for loans. Be careful about the ones you choose to assist. They might not be honest with you. Don't fall for any sob stories.
leo.deploy_today: Maybe — success is real, but document everything before someone else presents it in the all-hands.
leo.prophecy: Business is booming. Your teammate is already drafting their LinkedIn post about their 'key contributions.' 😏

virgo.horoscope_text: As your career dreams continue to unfold, Virgo, you may find that there is a downside. First, there are new responsibilities and you might doubt your ability to fulfill them. Second, you might find yourself catapulted into the uncomfortable realm of office politics. Don't let these matters put a damper on your enthusiasm. You have what it takes to fulfill the first concern and the wisdom to avoid the second. Onward and upward.
virgo.deploy_today: No — you've been promoted into office politics. This is not the day to introduce new failure modes.
virgo.prophecy: Your career dreams are unfolding. They come with a new Jira board, three stakeholder syncs, and someone else's RFC to review.

libra.horoscope_text: Recent spiritual breakthroughs might have you feeling both exhilarated and downcast. Your sensitive side tells you that this is a definite step forward on your spiritual path, but your logical side might cause you to doubt the reality of it. Take comfort in the fact that reality is relative, Libra. What you're sensing is at least valid for you. Then keep moving ahead.
libra.deploy_today: No — if you're questioning the nature of reality, do not also question whether the deployment succeeded.
libra.prophecy: The stars say reality is relative. Your unit tests beg to differ. 🙃

scorpio.horoscope_text: Many of your personal goals have either been met or are in the process of manifesting, Scorpio. This has you feeling exhilarated. However, others around you might have their hands out. You might be asked to contribute to charities or make personal loans to people you don't really know. You tend to want to be of assistance wherever you can but be discriminating about helping others right now. Some people may be less than trustworthy.
scorpio.deploy_today: Yes — goals are manifesting. Just don't give anyone else the deploy button.
scorpio.prophecy: Goals met. Three people have already DMed asking if you can 'just quickly take a look' at their PR. 👀

sagittarius.horoscope_text: More confirmation of career and business success could come your way today, Sagittarius. You're probably feeling excited and motivated to keep pushing ahead. You might find, however, that increased responsibilities interfere with your social life and wonder if your friends have forgotten you. They haven't, but you'll feel better if you eke out a few hours for friends each week. Remember what they say about all work and no play.
sagittarius.deploy_today: Yes — momentum is real. Just don't skip the code review because you're on a roll.
sagittarius.prophecy: Career success confirmed. Your friends haven't forgotten you — your commit history has.

capricorn.horoscope_text: Success on all levels is filling your life and making you feel absolutely wonderful, Capricorn. The downside of this is that you might be a little too conscientious. Are you putting in a lot of extra hours? Be discriminating about this. Don't work harder than you need to. You could stress yourself out to the point where you tax your strength too much. That won't get you anywhere. Pace yourself.
capricorn.deploy_today: No — you have been working too hard to think straight. The deployment will still be there after you sleep.
capricorn.prophecy: Success on all levels. You have been 'just finishing one more thing' for four hours. 🫠

aquarius.horoscope_text: Hard work, enthusiasm, and dedication are now paying off for you financially, Aquarius. New opportunities could be opening up for you to profit from your artistic talents. The downside of this is that you might be working so hard that you're too drained to be creative, even though the inspiration is there. Take a moment to rework your schedule to accomplish the most in the least amount of time.
aquarius.deploy_today: Maybe — the inspiration is there. Your brain checked out at 3pm and has not returned.
aquarius.prophecy: The breakthrough is right there. You are too exhausted to open your IDE.

pisces.horoscope_text: People close to you might be a bit worried about you, Pisces. Too much work might have you feeling a bit less than your usual self, perhaps even a little feverish and headachy. If so, this is a good day to take some time out, stay home, and get some rest. Don't worry about sabotaging your success. It will continue. Take a break and get back to the helm tomorrow.
pisces.deploy_today: No — you have a headache and just wrote 'changes look fine' in your PR review. They do not look fine.
pisces.prophecy: The stars say take a rest day. Your laptop is open and your Slack is green. 🫠
